title: Cinematic Action Scene 2 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic vertical Angry Birds action photo built around adult man in a white T-shirt and brown cargo pants leaping through an Angry Birds action world. Subject: adult man in a white T-shirt and brown cargo pants leaping through an Angry Birds action world is the action hero, with readable face, athletic pose, textured clothing, and clear escape direction. Visible styling and props: fitted white T-shirt, tactical brown cargo pants, athletic white sneakers with red-yellow accents, richly textured fabric, and flying debris. Scene: Angry Birds island world with rolling green hills, collapsing wooden platforms, stone blocks, TNT crates, and bright game-like depth provides a bright toy-like Angry Birds island environment with game-like depth, collapsing platforms, and recognizable adventure energy. Composition: leaping away from detonating crates and shattered planks while debris, red sparks, and glass fragments freeze mid-air; fixed vertical 4:5 Instagram action crop, 28mm lens depth, low-angle leap, sharp focus on hero subject, foreground debris, and blurred rolling hills behind. Signature Elements: Red Bird, wooden planks, stone blocks, TNT crate explosions, sparks, dust, and flying debris surround the leap while preserving the source action-advertising spectacle. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic action photography blended with the playful Angry Birds game-world aesthetic, richly textured clothing, detailed debris, sparks, dust, and polished high-energy realism. Color Palette: Fixed bright green hills, warm wood, red-yellow spark accents, white shirt, brown cargo fabric, and clear blue outdoor light. Lighting: Crisp outdoor action lighting with rim highlights on the hero, flying debris, TNT crates, wooden planks, and Red Bird. Camera: 28mm action lens feeling, strong perspective depth, sharp subject focus, motion energy, and dramatic foreground debris. Restrictions: Keep coherent anatomy, clear action direction, sharp debris, readable Angry Birds staging, and polished cinematic advertising finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
